title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MCX - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at MCX are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MCX:
MCX is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX!
